title: calycera microphylla
intro: Calycera microphylla, also known as the small-flowered calycera or calycera, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The plant's extracts and essential oils have been used to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, improve digestive health, and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, calycera microphylla is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and provide health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
